zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III於1413年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan84歲，母親Lady Janet de Danielstoun83歲。他於1428年與Lady Euphame Kennedy在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾享年45歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III于1413年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan84岁，母亲Lady Janet de Danielstoun83岁。他于1428年与Lady Euphame Kennedy在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年在英国苏格兰度福利爾享年45岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III was born in 1413, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan, was 84 and his mother, Lady Janet de Danielstoun, was 83. He married Lady Euphame Kennedy in 1428, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1458, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Kilmaurs, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III est né en 1413, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan, avait 84 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet de Danielstoun, avait 83 ans. Il a épousé Lady Euphame Kennedy en 1428, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1458, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmaurs, East Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III 1413 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan 84 und seine Mutter Lady Janet de Danielstoun 83. Er hat 1428 in Ayrshire, Scotland Lady Euphame Kennedy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1458 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilmaurs, East Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III è nato il nel 1413 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan, aveva 84 anni e il suo madre, Lady Janet de Danielstoun, aveva 83 anni. Lui sposato Lady Euphame Kennedy nel 1428, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1458, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmaurs, East Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan IIIが1413年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallanは84歳，母Lady Janet de Danielstounは83歳であった。1428年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでLady Euphame Kennedyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで45歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアキルマアウルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III(이)가 1413년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan(은)는 84세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Janet de Danielstoun(은)는 83세였다. 그는 1428년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Lady Euphame Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 킬모르스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Euphame Kennedy em 1428, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Archibald Mure 6th of Rowallan III родился в 1413 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan было 84 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet de Danielstoun, 83. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Euphame Kennedy в 1428 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1458 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности килмаурс, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
